summary_ko:

• 해상 봉쇄의 구체적 실행 방식과 법적 근거가 논란이 되고 있다.
• 미 해군의 실제 작전 범위와 국제법상 정당성이 검토 대상이다.
reason: 미국의 해상 봉쇄 전략은 전쟁 양상을 결정하는 핵심 군사 작전

• 에너지, 무역, 금융시장 등 다방면의 경제적 충격에 대한 우려가 표명되었다.
reason: 세계 지도자들의 전쟁 경제 영향 평가는 향후 정책 방향을 예측하는 중요 지표

reason: 이란 내부 여론과 미국과의 협상 가능성은 휴전 지속 여부의 핵심 변수

title: Iran's Araqchi discusses efforts to end war and Hormuz security with Oman
summary:
April 26 (Reuters) - Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi held talks in Oman on Sunday and discussed security in the Strait of Hormuz and broader Gulf waters and diplomatic efforts to end the Iran-U.S. conflict, according to an Iranian foreign ministry statement.

summary:
April 26 (Reuters) - Israeli strikes killed 14 people and wounded 37 on Sunday, Lebanon's health ministry said, as the Israeli military warned residents to leave seven towns beyond the "buffer zone" it occupied before a ceasefire that has failed to fully halt hostilities.

Sunday's death toll included two children and two women, the health ministry added in a statement. Israel said one of its soldiers was also killed as a fragile ceasefire came under further strain.

title: The Importance of the Raid of Nassau
summary: Marines and sailors splashing ashore from landing boats has become a defining image of the history of the U.S. Marine Corps. It happened for the first time at the town of Nassau in the British colony of the Bahamas on March 3, 1776. While the operation itself was a tactical success, its impact on the broader war for American independence was marred by inexperience and poor judgment. Despite this, the raid of Nassau offers important insights for contemporary naval forces, including the challen
